summary: COMPARISON layout: left z-plane shows a 7x7 BLUE lattice of Gaussian integers (u,v in -3..3), right z^2-plane shows where each squares to. RED highlight picks z=2+i -> z^2=3+4i, producing the (3,4,5) triple. LaggedStart sequences all 48 output points; bottom formula label confirms (u^2-v^2, 2uv, u^2+v^2).
